raw_message: Buenas tardes, me recomendaron con ustedes. Tengo un lote en un fraccionamiento privado en San José del Cabo y quiero construir mi casa. Hay reglamento de construcción del fraccionamiento.
initial_assessment: Project classified as residential_in_development: client owns a 1,200 sqm lot within a private gated community (Residencial Vista del Mar) in San José del Cabo, BCS, with strict covenants governing style (contemporary only), facade materials (natural stone and stucco), and height (7m limit). Total programmed area is 337 sqm including 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, pool, office, family room, and terraces — a well-defined and substantive program. Budget range of USD 400,000–700,000 is realistic for this program size and location. Client profile is design_engaged, arrived via professional referral, and is clearly aware of the HOA constraints — strong candidate for full project activation.
